narrative:
Yamil yamil is a Right Winger representing Equatorial Guinea in this tournament. His overall rating stands at 7.27/10, positioning him among the top 4% of right wingers at this World Cup. This strong rating is significantly influenced by his club form over the last two seasons, which accounts for 69% of the score.

At this World Cup, Yamil yamil shows an aggressive offensive mindset, taking 3.714 shots per 90 minutes. He also contributes defensively with 2.0 tackles per 90 minutes, demonstrating his work rate. His expected goals (xG) per 90 minutes at 0.359 are slightly higher than his actual goals per 90 minutes at 0.286, suggesting opportunities that could be converted more efficiently.

Yamil yamil serves as a vital attacking presence for Equatorial Guinea, having played 315 minutes so far. Scouts and fans should keenly observe his ability to create chances, evident from his 1.429 key passes per 90 minutes. His dual threat in both goal-scoring attempts and defensive contributions makes him a key player in their remaining fixtures.
